images.title: Chalutiers méditerranéens du Grau-d'Agde (Ifremer 00624-73611 - 29240).jpg
images.description:
Photographs showing various trawlers from Grau-d'Agde, returning from fishing.

The town of Agde (Hérault), known for its tourist activities (seaside resort and marina of Cap d'Agde), also has a fishing port and a fish market in Grau-d'Agde.

images.title: Chalutier méditerranéen du Grau-d'Agde (Ifremer 00681-79292 - 32145).jpg
images.description:
The Belle-Ile-II trawler from Grau-d'Agde, returning from fishing, goes up the Hérault towards the auction to unload its fish catch.

Photo taken during activity surveys set up by the Fisheries Information System (SIH).

images.title: Grande Conque, Agde, Hérault 01.jpg
images.description: Grande Conque, a little cove formed by a cinder cone the north side of which constitutes the cliff around the beach. Cap d'Agde, Agde, Hérault, France.
